channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: Cam Skattebo ran for 147 yards and three touchdowns, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and a score, and No. 21 Arizona State beat No. 14 BYU 28-23.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Devin Neal scores 4 times, Kansas beats No. 16 Colorado 37-21 as Buffs' Big 12 title hopes take hit
item.description: Devin Neal ran for 207 yards and three touchdowns, caught four passes for 80 yards and another score, and led Kansas to a 37-21 victory over No. 16 Colorado on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Same glitz and glamour for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, and perhaps another Verstappen championship
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Max Verstappen returned to the Las Vegas Grand Prix as the defending winner of the Sin City spectacle and a fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship well within his reach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 Illinois stuns Rutgers on Bryant's 40-yard TD reception with 4 seconds left
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Trailing by one at the 40-yard line with 14 seconds to play and no timeouts, Illinois coach Bret Bielema sent in a play known as “church” to Luke Altmyer. The quarterback was to hit a receiver who was to go to the ground immediately.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man City routed 4-0 by Tottenham in fifth-straight defeat as crisis deepens for Pep Guardiola
item.description: What started as an evening of celebration for Manchester City ended with the four-time defending Premier League champion falling to a fifth-straight loss in all competitions and facing a deepening crisis in a season that is threatening to unravel.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Giannis gets triple-double as Bucks rout Pacers in NBA Cup
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, 11 assists, and 10 rebounds for his second triple-double in his last four games, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 129-117 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Caprock Academy Hockey plays first ever varsity game
item.description: The Caprock Academy Eagles -- featuring players from all five Valley schools (Grand Junction, Palisade, Fruita, Central and Caprock) -- kicked off their inaugural varsity season at the Jorgensen Event Center in Gunnison against Colorado Academy.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LaVine, Dosunmu and White power the Bulls to a 136-122 win over the Hawks
item.description: Zach LaVine scored 26 points, Ayo Dosunmu and Coby White each had 20 and the Chicago Bulls beat the Atlanta Hawks 136-122 on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boston shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 1-0
item.description: BOSTON (ABC4 Sports) - For the fifth time this season, the Utah Hockey Club failed to score a single goal. Joonas Korpisalo made 21 saves for the Boston Bruins in a 1-0 win against the Utah Hockey Club at TD Garden on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose football aims to earn spot in 4A final four
item.description: The only Western Slope high school football team still alive and still fighting for a title is the 11-0 Montrose Red Hawks, the 2-seed in 4A.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz unable to hold fourth quarter lead in loss to Kings
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring 60 points in a losing effort the night before, De'Aaron Fox scored 49 points to lead the Sacramento Kings to a 121-117 win over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
